prompt: Two references are attached: a PHOTO of the actual dish, and a vintage voucher whose food illustration shows the ENGRAVING STYLE to use. Draw the dish from the photo as a hand-tinted chromolithograph in that engraving style: two open-faced folded bao buns with seasoned meat filling and fresh cilantro sprigs, soft pillowy buns. Hand-tinted color washes over warm ochre engraved linework: soft white-gold buns with warm shading, rich glossy brown filling, unmistakably fresh green cilantro, a whisper of pale cucumber. Centered on a plain flat harvest gold (#E0AC45) background with NOTHING else - no border, no frame, no text, no table scene. Do not copy any layout, border, or text from the voucher reference. Subject fills about 70% of the frame. Bright and vivid, no darkening, no aging wash, no shadows. Flat traditional print illustration, no photorealism.
